forager.model

Class Environnement

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.Environnement

  • public class Environnement
extends Object
    Environnement of the Forager game.
    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      List<AgentEntity> agents
      List of all agents in the environnement.
      List<FixedObject> entities
      List of all ressources/obstacles in the environnement.
      protected QuadTree<FixedObject> grid
      The Quadtree of ressource/obstacle.
      protected int gridMaxDepth
      Maximum depth of the Quadtree.
      Dimension size
      Size of the environnement.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Environnement(Dimension size)
      Create a new environnement of a given size.
      Environnement(Dimension size, List<FixedObject> entities)
      Create a new environnement of a given size, with ressources/obstacles.
      Environnement(int width, int height)
      Create a new environnement of a given size.
      Environnement(int width, int height, List<FixedObject> entities)
      Create a new environnement of a given size.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(AgentEntity agent)
      Add an agent in the environnement.
      void add(FixedObject obj)
      Add an object ressource/wall in the environnement.
      void addAll(List<FixedObject> objs)
      Add multiple objects ressource/wall in the environnement.
      List<FixedObject> collide(Rectangle hitbox)
      Get the list of object who collide whith a certain hitbox.
      void createRessource(Map.Entry<String,Integer> ressource, Point position)
      Create a new ressource in the environnement.
      static int getCount()
      Get the number of agent created in the environnement and increase the counter.
      boolean remove(AgentEntity agent)
      Remove an agent from the environnement.
      boolean remove(FixedObject obj)
      Remove an object from the environnement.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Environnement

        public Environnement(Dimension size)
        Create a new environnement of a given size.
        Parameters:
        size - The size of the environnement.

      • Environnement

        public Environnement(int width,
             int height)
        Create a new environnement of a given size.
        Parameters:
        width - The width of the environnement.
        height - The height of the environnement.

      • Environnement

        public Environnement(Dimension size,
             List<FixedObject> entities)
        Create a new environnement of a given size, with ressources/obstacles.
        Parameters:
        size - The size of the environnement.
        entities - The existing entities.

      • Environnement

        public Environnement(int width,
             int height,
             List<FixedObject> entities)
        Create a new environnement of a given size.
        Parameters:
        width - The width of the environnement.
        height - The height of the environnement.
        entities - The existing entities.

    • Method Detail

      • add

        public void add(FixedObject obj)
        Add an object ressource/wall in the environnement.
        Parameters:
        obj - The object.

      • add

        public void add(AgentEntity agent)
        Add an agent in the environnement.
        Parameters:
        agent - The agent.

      • addAll

        public void addAll(List<FixedObject> objs)
        Add multiple objects ressource/wall in the environnement.
        Parameters:
        objs - A list of objects.

      • collide

        public List<FixedObject> collide(Rectangle hitbox)
        Get the list of object who collide whith a certain hitbox.
        Parameters:
        hitbox - The hitbox, not null.
        Returns:
        The list of object.

      • createRessource

        public void createRessource(Map.Entry<String,Integer> ressource,
                   Point position)
        Create a new ressource in the environnement.
        Parameters:
        ressource - The ressource.
        position - The position of the ressource.

      • getCount

        public static int getCount()
        Get the number of agent created in the environnement and increase the counter.
        Returns:
        The number of agent who have been created.

      • remove

        public boolean remove(FixedObject obj)
        Remove an object from the environnement.
        Parameters:
        obj - The object.
        Returns:
        True if the object has been removed, else false.

      • remove

        public boolean remove(AgentEntity agent)
        Remove an agent from the environnement.
        Parameters:
        agent - The agent.
        Returns:
        True if the agent has been removed, else false.
